case_title: TOMAS A. HERNANDEZ VS. TAYLOR MARIE EDWARDS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-30-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
